fields.label: Stripe Price ID
fields.name: stripe_price_id
fields.instructions: The Price ID from the Stripe Dashboard (starts with price_). Auto-populated by the pull-products sync command.

fields.label: Stripe Product ID
fields.name: stripe_product_id
fields.instructions: The Product ID from Stripe (starts with prod_). Auto-populated by the pull-products sync command.

fields.label: Display Price
fields.name: price
fields.instructions: Display price shown on the storefront. Stripe is the source of truth for the actual charge. Auto-populated by sync.

fields.label: Sale Price
fields.name: sale_price
fields.instructions: Display sale price (e.g., $99.99). Auto-populated by sync when sale_price_id is set in Stripe metadata.

fields.label: Sale Stripe Price ID
fields.name: sale_price_id
fields.instructions: The Stripe Price ID for the sale price. When present, product is on sale. Auto-populated by sync.

fields.label: SKU
fields.name: sku
fields.instructions: Optional stock-keeping unit for internal tracking.

fields.label: Cost Per Unit
fields.name: cost
fields.instructions: Per-unit cost from supplier. Auto-populated by sync from Stripe cost metadata. Used for margin calculation. Internal only — never exposed via WPGraphQL.

fields.label: Stock Quantity
fields.name: stock_quantity
fields.instructions: Number of units available. Decremented automatically on successful payment.

fields.label: Language
fields.name: language
fields.instructions: Product language (e.g., Japanese, English). Auto-populated by sync from Stripe language metadata.
